_comment: Source-of-truth registry for shared Jarvis KBs (see docs/kb-standards.md §6). Drives BOTH n8n ingestion and the chat agent's list_kbs/search_kb tools. Add a KB = add an entry here. All KBs embed with bge-m3 (1024-dim, Cosine) via LiteLLM.

kbs.name: kb_homelab_docs
kbs.description: Homelab infrastructure docs — the Docker stack services, deployment on the jarvis server, networking/Traefik/SSO, monitoring/alerting, and the AI stack (LiteLLM, Qdrant, n8n, OpenWebUI, ComfyUI). Use for questions about how the homelab is built, configured, or operated.

kbs.name: kb_trading_docs
kbs.description: Trading engine documentation and design — system architecture, per-app and library docs, migration notes, and platform-services integration for the trading system. Use for questions about the trading engine's design, components, or how it uses the Jarvis platform.

kbs.name: kb_design_docs
kbs.description: Product and business design documentation — architecture, requirements, terminology/glossary, business and marketing material, and patents. Use for questions about product vision, requirements, business strategy, or defined terms.

kbs.name: kb_apollo_docs
kbs.description: Apollo app documentation (the docs/ tree of the apollo repo). Disabled by default — Apollo is an application, not a primary doc source; enable if its design docs should be shared-searchable.

kbs.name: kb_mddocsviewer_docs
kbs.description: md-docs-viewer app docs. Disabled by default — it's a Next.js viewer app, not a knowledge source; enable only if its docs/ are real reference material.
